statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: The first line contains two space-separated integers, n and w, where n is the number of items and w is the maximum weight capacity of the knapsack. The next n lines contain two space-separated integers, w_i and p_i, where w_i is the weight of the ith item and p_i is the price of the ith item.
statement.outputFormat: Output the maximum value that can be put in a knapsack of capacity w.
statement.notes: The items can be either included or excluded from the knapsack.

hints.text: Check the order of the for loop
